name: io.github.iamsamuelfraga/mcp-hubspot
description: Enterprise-grade HubSpot CRM integration with 37 MCP tools for sales, workflows, and automation

HUBSPOT_TOOLSETS.description: Comma-separated toolsets to enable (e.g., 'sales,workflows'). Defaults to all toolsets.

LOG_LEVEL.description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, warn, error. Defaults to info.
